scripts.build:all: npm run build -w @mesa/web && npm run build -w @mesa/ops
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @mesa/web && npm run lint -w @mesa/ops
scripts.test:unit: cd apps/web && node --import tsx --test src/lib/resolve-append-cart-items.test.ts src/lib/checkout-split-math.test.ts src/lib/checkout-confirm-payment.test.ts src/lib/checkout-discount/validate-discount-reason.test.ts src/lib/audit/validate-abnormal-reason.test.ts src/lib/audit/builders/discount-applied.test.ts src/lib/audit/builders/abnormal-owner-action.test.ts src/lib/abnormal-operations/parse-list-query.test.ts src/lib/abnormal-operations/patch-abnormal-operation.service.test.ts src/lib/close-table-session-ui.test.ts src/lib/bill-split-by-item.test.ts src/lib/order-receipt-enqueue.test.ts src/lib/abnormal-operations.test.ts src/lib/analytics/analytics.service.test.ts src/lib/audit/audit.service.test.ts src/lib/table-session/close-table-session.service.test.ts src/lib/order-item-void/detect-newly-voided.test.ts src/lib/order-item-void/validate-void-reason.test.ts src/lib/order-item-void/decrement-order-item.test.ts src/lib/order-item-void/decrement-order-item.service.test.ts src/lib/order-item-void/persist-order-items-update.test.ts
